title: Trump’s China summit shows toll of a difficult year for the president
summary_full: A year ago, the president promised a new era in the first major foreign trip of his second term. Now in Beijing, the war with Iran and economic strain have clouded his diplomacy.
summary_public: A year ago, the president promised a new era in the first major foreign trip of his second term. Now in Beijing, the war with Iran and economic strain have clouded his diplomacy.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: war with Iran and economic strain have clouded his diplomacy
